title: alisma nanum
intro: Alisma nanum, also known as water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Alisma nanum include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Alisma nanum is often prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is traditionally used in Chinese and Korean medicine.
